steps.text: Captain, we have a situation. Someone has eaten the emergency chocolate. The wrapper was found near the medbay. An investigation is underway.
Update: everyone claims innocence. The cat has an alibi. Marvin says, quote, 'it was probably me, everything else is.' We doubt it. He has no mouth for chocolate.
Breakthrough: chocolate traces detected on the science console. Science claims it was 'calibration.' We are consulting the dictionary.
Case closed. It was Science, who confessed beautifully and cited 'morale research.' Sentence: they must share the backup chocolate. Justice, Captain. Justice.
